blogManagement.title: Blog management
blogManagement.slugHint: Appears as joinvibo.com/blogs/your-slug — use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
blogManagement.bodyHint: Use the toolbar for headings, bold, colors, lists, and links.
blogManagement.publishHint: Use “Publish post” to show this on /blogs. Use “Save as draft” to hide it until you publish later.
blogManagement.configuredHint: Admin login uses server environment variables (never commit passwords to Git).

hero.headline: Real people. Real moments.
hero.subtitle: A global social platform born in the Middle East, connecting creators worldwide.

about.statement: Vibo is where creativity meets community. A space for everyone to share their story, discover new perspectives, connect with the world, and find the things that truly move them. We believe every person has something worth sharing.

phone.label: The App Experience
phone.heading: Your world, your feed, your way.
phone.description: Scroll through an endless stream of content tailored just for you. Like, comment, share, and connect with creators from around the globe — all from one powerful app.

bentoHeading: Built for creators, designed for everyone.

bento.label: Short Videos
bento.heading: Create and share short videos that captivate, inspire, and start conversations.

bento.label: Stories
bento.heading: Share your day, your way. Moments that disappear but leave a lasting impression.

bento.label: Messaging
bento.heading: Stay connected with the people who matter most to you.

bento.label: Explore
bento.heading: Discover trends, creators, and content curated just for you.

bento.label: For Every Creator
bento.heading: Tools, reach, and community to grow your voice.

creators.label: Creator Spotlight
creators.heading: Meet the voices shaping Vibo.
creators.description: From storytellers to artists, dancers to educators — our creators are redefining what social media can be.

cinematic.label: The Vibo Experience
cinematic.heading: Where every scroll tells a story.
cinematic.description: Immerse yourself in a world of authentic content — from breathtaking visuals to raw, unfiltered moments that bring people together.

safety.heading: Your safety is our priority.
safety.description: We're committed to creating a safe, supportive environment where everyone can express themselves freely. Our tools and policies are designed to protect our community.

features.title: Content Moderation
features.description: AI-powered systems review content 24/7 to keep the community safe and welcoming.

features.title: Privacy Controls
features.description: Full control over who sees your content, messages you, and interacts with your profile.

features.title: Transparency Reports
features.description: Regular reports on how we enforce our community guidelines and protect users.

cta.heading: Start your story on Vibo.
cta.subtitle: Download the app and join millions of creators, storytellers, and explorers around the world.

newsroomManagement.title: Newsroom management
newsroomManagement.subtitle: Fetch latest articles, review them, and approve per article to publish in the public Newsroom.
newsroomManagement.empty: No draft articles in this category yet. Click “Fetch latest”.
newsroomManagement.notAuthorized: Please sign in to moderate news.

hero.subtitle: Grow your business, push creative boundaries, and build lasting connections — all in one place.

businesses.tagline: Built for brands that value authentic connection.
businesses.objectivesLabel: What do you want to achieve?
businesses.objectivesHeading: Get results that matter throughout the customer journey.

goals.title: Grow awareness.
goals.text: Share content and test different formats so more people discover your brand and products.

goals.title: Get new customers.
goals.text: Encourage people to purchase your product or service by clicking through to your website.

goals.title: Build relationships.
goals.text: Grow your community by encouraging conversations through messages and comments.

businesses.creativeHeading: Experiment with Vibo's creative tools to find what resonates with your community.
businesses.creativeLead: Use features like short-form video, Remix, and product tags to put your spin on trends.
businesses.creativeBody: Start your own momentum and reach people who are most likely to be interested in your business.

reelComment.message: This collab is everything ✨ Love the energy — already shared with my friends!

steps: Step 1: Choose a post to boost.
Step 3: Set a budget and duration.
Step 4: Review and launch your ad.
stepDetails: Pick a post that shows your product or story well — it becomes the creative people see in the feed.
Reach people similar to your best customers, or build a custom audience by interests, age, and location.
Choose a comfortable daily or total spend and how long the campaign runs. You can adjust anytime.
Double-check your creative, audience, and budget, then go live — pause or edit whenever you need.

phoneUi.budgetFootnote: You won't be charged more than your cap.

businesses.insightsBody: Performance insights can help you unlock your ad's success. Then use what you learn to make more effective ads.
businesses.ctaBandBody: Download the app to run campaigns, engage your community, and measure results in one place.
businesses.faqSub: Got questions about Vibo ads? We've got answers.

faqs.q: How can I make the best possible ad?
faqs.a: Lead with a clear hook in the first seconds, show real product or service benefits, and use high-quality visuals. Test variations in creative and audience, then scale what performs best.

faqs.q: How do I find my target audience?
faqs.a: Start from people similar to your existing followers or customers, then refine by interests, behaviors, and geography. Let early results guide which segments to expand or narrow.

faqs.q: What insights can I gain from my ads?
faqs.a: You can track reach, engagement, clicks, and conversions depending on your objective. Use breakdowns to see which creatives and audiences drive the most efficient results.

faqs.q: How can I get started advertising on Vibo?
faqs.a: Install Vibo, set up your business profile, pick a post or creative to promote, choose your goal and budget, then launch. Our team is expanding self-serve tools — stay tuned for updates.
